lineup_source: Czechia vs South Africa, Group A, 18 June 2026 (3-4-2-1)

players.name: Matěj Kovář
players.note: Born in Uherské Hradiště; father Jakub Kovář, no documented foreign heritage.

players.name: Ladislav Krejčí
players.note: Born in Rosice; grew up with Czech parents, father introduced him to football.

players.name: Robin Hranáč
players.note: Born in Plzeň; no documented heritage beyond Czech family background.

players.name: Štěpán Chaloupek
players.note: Born in Meziboří; typical Czech name, no documented foreign heritage.

players.name: Jaroslav Zelený
players.note: Born in Hradec Králové; no documented foreign heritage.

players.name: Vladimír Coufal
players.note: Born in Ludgeřovice; mother Alena Dřevjaná was a Czechoslovak Olympic gymnast (1988).

players.name: Tomáš Souček
players.note: Born in Havlíčkův Brod to father František (manager) and mother Iva, a former handball player.

players.name: Alexandr Sojka
players.note: From Klatovy; father Jindřich Sojka Sr. was a footballer and longtime club chairman there.

players.name: Pavel Šulc
players.note: Born in Karlovy Vary; no documented foreign heritage.

players.name: Lukáš Provod
players.note: Born and raised in Plzeň; no documented foreign heritage.

players.name: Patrik Schick
players.note: Born in Prague to mother Iveta Schicková and a father who worked as a confectioner; surname is of German-Bohemian linguistic origin but family is Czech.
